title: OpenAI launches GPT-Live with real-time simultaneous conversation
summary: The new voice model allows fluid dialogues with active listening and immediate response, available on multiple platforms.

title: Meta faces wave of criticism over privacy of its smart glasses and use of Instagram photos
summary: The company is accused of invading privacy with new AI tools and continuous recording glasses, while courts restrict their use.

title: The video game industry trembles: crisis at Sony over physical discs and layoffs at Microsoft Xbox
summary: Sony faces lawsuits and investor flight over its digital policies, while Xbox tries to contain controversy over staff cuts.

title: Elon Musk's empire accumulates milestones and controversies: nuclear satellites, stock drop and SEC agreement
summary: SpaceX launches a commercial nuclear satellite, stocks plummet, Space Force receives a ray weapon, and Musk reaches agreement with stock market regulator.

title: SpaceXAI presents Grok 4.5, a high-performance low-cost AI model
summary: Elon Musk rates the new model as 'Opus class', competing directly with GPT-5 and Gemini for a fraction of the price.

title: Privacy in telecommunications: Truecaller challenges India and anonymous SIMs return to Spain
summary: Privacy regulations clash with commercial interests, while Spanish operators reintroduce prepaid cards without identification.

title: Multiple vulnerabilities put security of AI code assistants at risk
summary: Flaws in Copilot, GhostApproval, and other systems allow running malicious code, stealing credentials, and manipulating verified commits on GitHub.

title: Malware, backdoors and scams: global cybersecurity on alert
summary: From fake 7-Zip installers to critical flaws in Tenda routers, experts warn of a new wave of massive cyberattacks.

title: Assassin's Creed Black Flag Remake leaks online days before official launch
summary: Denuvo protection fails to prevent crackers from publishing a pirated version of the game, demonstrating its vulnerability.

title: High cost of memory causes collapse of cheap smartphone market
summary: Memory components account for up to 64% of total cost, reducing expected sales by 22% globally.

title: Oregon forces data centers to pay 30% more for electricity to lower household rates
summary: The new POWER Act seeks tech giants to contribute to energy costs, reducing household bills by 1.3%.

title: New massive leak exposes personal data and licenses of nearly 7 million drivers
summary: The cyberattack, reported by multiple sources, once again reveals the fragility of government identification systems.

title: DuckDuckGo launches automatic ad blocking on YouTube without needing to install extensions
summary: The free feature arrives weeks after YouTube increased the price of its Premium subscription, offering an alternative to users.

title: John Deere accepts historic FTC settlement so farmers can repair their own equipment
summary: The agricultural machinery manufacturer commits to facilitating access to parts and manuals, ending years of litigation over the right to repair.

title: The hardware world renews itself: new processors from AMD, Intel and Nvidia, and memory standards
summary: Leaks and official announcements set the pace for the next generation of PC components, from Arm CPUs to HBM4 memory.

title: Scientific discoveries about obesity, gut, climate and prehistory redefine our knowledge
summary: From genetics to climate change, science continues to unravel the mysteries of the human body and the planet.

title: From AI cheating in education to luxury living: technology transforms society
summary: Trends reveal a generation that prioritizes well-being over salary, the rise of plant-based beverages, and controversy in classrooms.

title: AI startups attract multi-million dollar investments in midst of sector boom
summary: Lovable, Prime Intellect, and Paradigm lead a funding round that reflects the investment frenzy for enterprise AI and autonomous agents.

title: Judge approves $47 million payment to victims of 23andMe massive data breach
summary: The financial compensation closes a chapter of the largest genetic data theft in history, affecting millions of users.

title: AI boom clashes with everyday life: neighbors denounce noise and pollution from data centers
summary: From unbearable noise in Michigan to water contamination in Cheyenne, the expansion of AI centers generates growing social unrest.
